title: AI Config Generation Response Schema
description: Schema for AI responses when generating or refining column configurations

general_notes.description: General notes about the validation configuration

clarifying_questions.description: 2-4 specific questions to help improve the configuration further

clarification_urgency.description: Urgency score from 0-1: 0 = no clarification needed, 1 = critical columns will likely be wrong without clarification

ai_summary.description:
Clear AI summary in simple language explaining what was configured:

FOR NEW CONFIGURATIONS:
- Identify the table's general purpose and domain
- List critical columns and why they're important
- Specify ID/key columns used for row identification (not validated)
- For each search group, provide:
  • Group name and purpose
  • Columns included (use clear formatting)
  • Context level (high/low) and model used
- Highlight any special settings (high context, Claude model usage)
- Assessment: Are table structure and column importance well understood, or is refinement recommended?

FOR REFINEMENTS:
- Summarize key changes made
- List affected columns and search groups
- Explain reasoning behind major modifications
- Assessment: Is the configuration now well-tuned, or are further refinements needed?
